description: Gets all Groups in a given Company

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

items.description: Response schema for a single Group.

timezone.description: The timezone associated with the Group.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Group.

address_1.description: The first part of the Group's address.

address_2.description: The second part of the Group's address (e.g., Building, Suite, Unit).

city_town.description: The city or town where the Group is located.

state_province.description: The state or province where the Group is located.

zipcode.description: The postal/zip code for the Group.

country.description: The country where the Group is located.

contact_name.description: The primary Point of Contact (P.O.C.) for the Group.

contact_number.description: Phone number for the Group’s Point of Contact.

contact_email.description: Email address for the Group’s Point of Contact.
